reason: Re-export DerivedElectronAPI so preload/index.ts can import it from ./types
Simplify type derivation — remove conditional type that blocks contextual typing
Fix WeakMap type mismatch — plugin transport handlers use dynamic arity signatures
Fix channel coverage assertion — previously used `as` cast which silently bypassed the check
Fix OPEN_PATH return type: shell.openPath() returns Promise<string> when !app, Promise<void> when app provided
Change `as never` to `as unknown as T` for better type safety — `never` is assignable to all types and silently accepts incompatible types
Unexport BridgeHandleMap — internal implementation detail of type derivation
Unexport BridgeSendMap — internal implementation detail of type derivation
